summary: CP-1 re-audit after corrections. All 3 previously blocked issues (CP1-001, CP1-002, CP1-003) have been resolved in quantitative_data.json. VINP P/FRE corrected to 19.4x, VINP P/DE corrected to 20.2x, BX HHI corrected to 2514. Five inferred issues remain from the original audit plus one new inferred issue (CP1-009) discovered during re-audit: PAX EV/FEAUM value was changed to 0.0194 (1.94%) which does not match any valid calculation — extraction notes still say 4.0% ($2.09B/$52.6B) and the correct FEAUM-based figure would be 5.1% ($2.09B/$40.8B). No new blocking issues found. Verdict upgraded from BLOCKED to PASSED with 6 inferred claims requiring hedged language in downstream analysis.

previous_blocked_claims_resolution.verification: Confirmed at line 3917 of quantitative_data.json. Value 19.4 matches extraction notes calculation ($790M / $40.7M = 19.4x). Correction annotation added to extraction_notes.
Confirmed at line 3929 of quantitative_data.json. Value 20.2 matches extraction notes calculation ($790M / $39.2M = 20.2x). Correction annotation added to extraction_notes.
Confirmed at line 197 of quantitative_data.json. Value 2514 matches extraction notes arithmetic (25^2 + 22^2 + 27^2 + 26^2 = 625 + 484 + 729 + 676 = 2514).

inferred_claims.description: PAX EV/FEAUM extraction_notes still cite $52.6B as denominator, which is Total AUM, not FEAUM ($40.8B). The correct market cap / FEAUM would be $2.09B / $40.8B = 5.1%. The extraction_notes and the stored value are internally inconsistent.
inferred_claims.revision_instruction: Update extraction_notes to use FEAUM $40.8B as denominator. Correct value would be 0.051 (5.1%). Alternatively mark as null since true EV (not just market cap) is required.

inferred_claims.description: Apollo HHI value stored as 5850, but extraction_notes compute 75^2 + 15^2 + 10^2 = 5625 + 225 + 100 = 5950. The stored value (5850) differs from the documented calculation (5950) by 100 points. Minor arithmetic discrepancy; not blocking since the directional conclusion (highly concentrated) is unchanged.
inferred_claims.revision_instruction: Replace MET-VD-010 value for FIRM-003 from 5850 to 5950 to match the documented segment breakdown.

inferred_claims.description: PAX FY2024 DE/share of $1.20 is back-calculated from FY2025 DE/share ($1.27) using the stated 6% growth rate ($1.27/1.06 = $1.198). While mathematically valid, this is an approximation. Should be verified against the FY2024 earnings release directly.
inferred_claims.revision_instruction: Verify PAX FY2024 DE/share against the actual FY2024 earnings release (Feb 12, 2025). Use hedged language ('approximately $1.20') in downstream analysis.

inferred_claims.description: Market cap reference dates vary significantly across firms: Dec 31, 2024 (most firms); Jan 2, 2025 (FIRM-004, 007); Dec 5, 2024 (FIRM-003); Feb 2026 (FIRM-017, 022); March 2026 (FIRM-019). PAX multiples use a March 2026 market cap with LTM earnings while most peers use Dec 2024 market cap with FY2024 earnings — a 15-month gap.
inferred_claims.revision_instruction: Document market cap temporal dispersion explicitly in methodology_notes. Flag firms with >30-day deviation from median reference date.

inferred_claims.description: BX EV/FEAUM uses true enterprise value ($217B = $188B market cap + ~$29B net debt) while most other firms use market cap as EV proxy. This creates a 3.5pp upward bias for BX on this metric relative to the peer group.
inferred_claims.revision_instruction: For consistency, either use market cap for all firms including BX ($188B / $830.7B = 22.6%), or compute true EV for all firms.

inferred_claims.description: NEW ISSUE found during re-audit. PAX EV/FEAUM value was changed from 0.040 to 0.0194 during the correction pass, but 0.0194 does not correspond to any valid calculation: $2.09B / $52.6B = 0.0397 (the original 4.0%), $2.09B / $40.8B = 0.0512 (the correct 5.1%), and no other plausible denominator yields 1.94%. The extraction_notes still state '4.0%'. The value 0.0194 appears to be an erroneous overcorrection. Not blocking because (a) PAX is the target company and its multiple is primarily used for positioning, not as a correlation input, and (b) the extraction_notes and valuation_multiples.json still contain the original data for cross-reference.
inferred_claims.revision_instruction: Replace FIRM-019 MET-VD-028 value from 0.0194 to 0.051 (= $2.09B / $40.8B FEAUM). Update extraction_notes to reference $40.8B FEAUM instead of $52.6B Total AUM.

data_quality_observations.observation: FRE margin validation (re-check): All FRE margins in quantitative_data.json are within the valid 0-100% range. Sampled all 24 firms. Values range from 0.30 (VINP, 30%) to 0.71 (KKR, 71%). No impossible values.
FEAUM vs Total AUM: For all firms where both metrics are available, FEAUM < Total AUM. No impossible inversions found.
DE/share and GAAP EPS cross-check: DE/share > GAAP EPS for all firms reporting both (expected since DE excludes non-cash charges). No contradictions.
Growth rate consistency: Spot-checked BX, BAM, KKR, PAX. YoY growth rates match absolute value changes across periods. No contradictions found.

Valuation multiples range check: All P/FRE values now in plausible range (9.4x to 47.1x). All P/DE values in plausible range (10.1x to 48.2x). No negative multiples. VINP correction (19.4x P/FRE, 20.2x P/DE) is now within expected range for an EM-discount alt manager.
Currency handling: FX conversions properly documented with local_currency_value, fx_rate, rate_type across tiers. No FX-converted figures mislabeled as original currency.
BAM post-spinoff: FY2022 DE/share correctly null. 3-year CAGR correctly null. No misleading growth rates from partial-year base.

HHI values: BX corrected to 2514 (verified against documented arithmetic). APO remains at 5850 (should be 5950 per notes, flagged as INFERRED CP1-005). All other HHI values not re-verified against arithmetic but directional conclusions are consistent with known asset class mixes.

firms_sampled: FIRM-001 (BX) — full re-verification of corrected HHI + multiples
FIRM-017 (VINP) — full re-verification of corrected P/FRE and P/DE [RESOLVED]
FIRM-019 (PAX) — full re-verification including EV/FEAUM [NEW INFERRED CP1-009]
metrics_audited: MET-VD-005 (Total AUM) — FEAUM < Total AUM check
MET-VD-010 (HHI) — arithmetic verification for FIRM-001 (resolved), FIRM-003 (inferred)
MET-VD-013 (FRE margin) — range check 0-100% for all firms
MET-VD-026 (P/FRE) — all 21 firms with data, VINP correction verified
MET-VD-027 (P/DE) — all 17 firms with data, VINP correction verified
MET-VD-028 (EV/FEAUM) — all 21 firms with data, PAX new issue flagged
